Mahmoud Gasser Hassan Rabee Student

mahmoudalshyal777@gmail.com

+201014778897

Nasr City, Cairo

https://www.linkedin.com/in/mahmoud-gasser/

https://github.com/MahmoudGasser

SUMMARY

Motivated Computer Science student still learning to become a Backend .NET Core Developer, with strong coding, problem-solving, and
AI skills. Proficient in C# with hands-on experience in software development and data structures. Passionate about building scalable,
efficient solutions and continuously learning new technologies. Seeking opportunities to contribute to impactful backend projects.

EXPERIENCE

7/24 – 8/24
Vodafone Summer Internship
contributed to the planning and design of cloud infrastructure, enhancing network capabilities and
operational efficiency. (Tools: VMware ESXi, vSphere).

EDUCATION

9/22 – 7/26
Ain Shams University
Bachelor of Computer and Information Science (CGPA: 3.486)

PROJECTS

8/25 – 9/25
Course Management System
ASP.NET Core MVC and Web API

• Developed a full-stack application to manage courses, students, instructors, and enrollments using EF Core
with one-to-many and many-to-many relationships. • Implemented MVC features: views, controllers, ViewData/​ViewBag/​ViewModels, form handling, client-side
and custom validations, partial views, and Ajax.

• Built a Web API layer with GET/​POST/​PUT/​DELETE endpoints, using repository pattern and dependency
injection to share business logic between MVC and API.
Technologies: ASP.NET Core MVC, EF Core, C#, Web API, SQL Server.

3/25 – 5/25
Steam Video Game Sales Prediction

• Merged and cleaned multiple Steam datasets to analyze game features, genres, platform support,
achievements, and user reviews. • Built and trained machine learning models to predict game sales and identify key factors driving success.

• Visualized insights to uncover patterns in user engagement and commercial performance.
Technologies: Python, pandas, NumPy, scikit-learn, Matplotlib, Seaborn, Jupyter Notebook.

10/24 – 01/25
FCIS ASU Operating System
Developed multi-threaded programs, simulated CPU scheduling algorithms (FCFS, Round Robin, Priority),
implemented thread synchronization using mutexes and semaphores, and built basic virtual memory/​page
replacement simulations.
Technologies: C 3/24 – 5/24
Fraud Detection Model
Built a machine learning system to identify and prevent fraudulent activities in transactions. Performed data
cleaning, feature engineering, and evaluated performance with metrics like precision, recall, and F1-score.
Technologies: Python, pandas, NumPy, scikit-learn, Jupyter Notebook.

4/23 – 7/23
Online shopping System
Developed a desktop application enabling buyers to browse, purchase, and rate products, and sellers to
manage inventory. Implemented structured programming concepts with a database for persistent data storage.
Features include order tracking, product search with autocomplete, subscriptions to sellers, and coupon-based
discounts.
Technologies: C++, Qt, MySQL, Structured Programming.

COURSES

01/2026 – 03/2026
Natural Language Processing (NLP) with Python
Maven Analytics (Udemy)

• Text preprocessing, tokenization, lemmatization • TF-IDF, Bag-of-Words, vectorization techniques • Sentiment analysis & topic modeling • Introduction to Deep Learning for NLP • Transformers architecture (attention mechanism basics) • Large Language Models (LLMs) fundamentals, and Hugging Face ecosystem (tokenizers, model usage)

7/25
C# & .NET Development
Essam AbdelNabi (Metigator)

• C# Fundamentals: Explored syntax, data types, control structures, exception handling, object-oriented
programming, and LINQ for querying collections. • Entity Framework Core: Data access and ORM concepts. • ASP.NET⁠
MVC & Web APIs: Developing structured web applications and robust backend services.

7/24 – 8/24
Computer Network Fundamentals
Mahara-Tech
Learned key networking concepts including network components, topologies, LAN/​WAN, OSI and TCP/​IP
models, and basic network configuration and troubleshooting.

2/23 – 7/23
C++ Programming Basics
Mohamed Abo-Hadhoud (Programming Advices)

• Completed a comprehensive C++ course series covering basic syntax, control structures, loops, arrays,
vectors, and functions. • Gained hands-on experience with Object-Oriented Programming: classes, objects, constructors/​destructors,
inheritance, polymorphism, and encapsulation. • Learned advanced concepts such as pointers, references, memory management, and debugging techniques.

SKILLS

Programming Languages:
C#,Java , Python ,C++,C

Databases:
Oracle, Microsoft SQL Server

Frameworks and Libraries:

Concepts
Algorithms & Data Structures, Machine Learning & Deep
Learning, Operating Systems, Object-Oriented Programming
(OOP)

• Windows Forms

• LINQ • Entity Framework Core (EF Core)

• ASP.NET MVC • .NET Web API • pandas • NumPy • scikit-learn • Matplotlib • Seaborn

Cloud and Infrastructure Tools

• VMware ESXi, vSphere

Certificates

Structured Programming Best Project Award from IBM
(ASU)
"Best System Project" award in the structured programming
project contest among 100+ teams.

Computer Graphics Blender Contest 3rd Place Project Award
(ASU)
Alone Together (Wall-E) Remake

Extra Curricular Activities | 8/25 – 9/25
.NET Backend Summer Training – OSC Student Activity, Ain Shams University

• Developed web applications and APIs using ASP.NET⁠
MVC and .NET Web API. • Implemented data access and ORM using Entity Framework Core, and wrote efficient queries with LINQ • Gained practical experience in backend development, strengthening skills in modern .NET technologies.

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content:
Motivated Computer Science student still learning to become a Backend .NET Core Developer, with strong coding, problem-solving, and
AI skills. Proficient in C# with hands-on experience in software development and data structures. Passionate about building scalable,
efficient solutions and continuously learning new technologies. Seeking opportunities to contribute to impactful backend projects.

operational efficiency. (Tools: VMware ESXi, vSphere).

Ain Shams University
Bachelor of Computer and Information Science (CGPA: 3.486)

sections.heading: Projects
sections.content:
8/25 – 9/25
Course Management System
ASP.NET Core MVC and Web API
• Developed a full-stack application to manage courses, students, instructors, and enrollments using EF Core
with one-to-many and many-to-many relationships. • Implemented MVC features: views, controllers, ViewData/​ViewBag/​ViewModels, form handling, client-side
and custom validations, partial views, and Ajax.
• Built a Web API layer with GET/​POST/​PUT/​DELETE endpoints, using repository pattern and dependency
injection to share business logic between MVC and API.
Technologies: ASP.NET Core MVC, EF Core, C#, Web API, SQL Server.
3/25 – 5/25
Steam Video Game Sales Prediction
• Merged and cleaned multiple Steam datasets to analyze game features, genres, platform support,
achievements, and user reviews. • Built and trained machine learning models to predict game sales and identify key factors driving success.
• Visualized insights to uncover patterns in user engagement and commercial performance.
Technologies: Python, pandas, NumPy, scikit-learn, Matplotlib, Seaborn, Jupyter Notebook.
10/24 – 01/25
FCIS ASU Operating System
Developed multi-threaded programs, simulated CPU scheduling algorithms (FCFS, Round Robin, Priority),
implemented thread synchronization using mutexes and semaphores, and built basic virtual memory/​page
replacement simulations.
Technologies: C 3/24 – 5/24
Fraud Detection Model
Built a machine learning system to identify and prevent fraudulent activities in transactions. Performed data
cleaning, feature engineering, and evaluated performance with metrics like precision, recall, and F1-score.
Technologies: Python, pandas, NumPy, scikit-learn, Jupyter Notebook.
4/23 – 7/23
Online shopping System
Developed a desktop application enabling buyers to browse, purchase, and rate products, and sellers to
manage inventory. Implemented structured programming concepts with a database for persistent data storage.
Features include order tracking, product search with autocomplete, subscriptions to sellers, and coupon-based
discounts.
Technologies: C++, Qt, MySQL, Structured Programming.
